openai.name: Text Embedding 3 Small
openai.description: Fast and cost-efficient embedding model suitable for semantic search, clustering, and lightweight RAG.

openai.name: Text Embedding 3 Large
openai.description: Most capable embedding model with higher accuracy for semantic search, retrieval, and complex RAG pipelines.

openai.name: Text Embedding Ada 002
openai.description: Legacy embedding model for semantic similarity and search; maintained for backward compatibility.

claude.name: Voyage 4 Large
claude.description: Best general-purpose and multilingual embedding model with top retrieval quality.

claude.name: Voyage 4
claude.description: Balanced model for general-purpose and multilingual retrieval with strong performance and efficiency.

claude.name: Voyage 4 Lite
claude.description: Optimized for low latency and cost-efficient embedding generation.

claude.name: Voyage 4 Nano
claude.description: Open-weight embedding model optimized for efficiency and flexible deployment.

claude.name: Voyage 3 Large
claude.description: Previous generation high-quality multilingual embedding model.

claude.name: Voyage 3.5
claude.description: Optimized embedding model for general-purpose multilingual retrieval.

claude.name: Voyage 3.5 Lite
claude.description: Cost-efficient and low-latency embedding model from the 3.5 series.

claude.name: Voyage Code 3
claude.description: Embedding model optimized specifically for code retrieval tasks.

claude.name: Voyage Finance 2
claude.description: Specialized embedding model for finance-related retrieval and RAG use cases.

claude.name: Voyage Law 2
claude.description: Embedding model optimized for legal and long-context retrieval tasks.

claude.name: Voyage Multimodal 3.5
claude.description: Multimodal embedding model supporting text, images, and video content.

claude.name: Voyage Multimodal 3
claude.description: Multimodal embedding model for text and rich image content.

gemini.name: Gemini Embedding 001
gemini.description: Text embedding model optimized for semantic search, document retrieval, and recommendation systems with flexible dimensional output.

gemini.name: Gemini Embedding 2
gemini.description: Multimodal embedding model supporting text, images, video, audio, and PDFs for cross-modal search and retrieval tasks.
